options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: continues
options.description:
number of continues before game over

game over teleports you to your ship, keeping items and open doors

options.name: floppy_req
options.description: how many floppy disks are required

options.name: gun_levels
options.description:
Zillion gun power for the number of Zillion power ups you pick up

For "restrictive", Champ is the only one that can get Zillion gun power level 3.

options.name: jump_levels
options.description:
jump levels for each character level

For "restrictive", Apple is the only one that can get jump level 3.

options.name: randomize_alarms
options.description: whether to randomize the locations of alarm sensors

options.name: max_level
options.description: the highest level you can get

options.name: start_char
options.description: which character you start with

options.name: opas_per_level
options.description:
how many Opa-Opas are required to level up

Lower makes you level up faster.

options.name: early_scope
options.description: make sure Scope is available early

options.name: skill
options.description:
the difficulty level of the game

higher skill:
- can require more precise platforming movement
- lowers your defense
- gives you less time to escape at the end

options.name: starting_cards
options.description:
how many ID Cards to start the game with

Refilling at the ship also ensures you have at least this many cards.
0 gives vanilla behavior.

options.name: map_gen
options.description:
- none: vanilla map
- rooms: random terrain inside rooms, but path through base is vanilla
- full: random path through base

options.name: priority_dead_ends
options.description:
Single locations that are in a dead end behind a door
(example: vanilla Apple location)
are prioritized for progression items.

options.name: room_gen
options.description: This Option has been Removed.

options.name: id_card_count
options.description:
how many ID Cards are in the game

Vanilla is 63

maximum total for all items is 144

options.name: bread_count
options.description:
how many Breads are in the game

Vanilla is 33

maximum total for all items is 144

options.name: opa_opa_count
options.description:
how many Opa-Opas are in the game

Vanilla is 26

maximum total for all items is 144

options.name: zillion_count
options.description:
how many Zillion gun power ups are in the game

Vanilla is 6

maximum total for all items is 144

options.name: floppy_disk_count
options.description:
how many Floppy Disks are in the game

Vanilla is 5

maximum total for all items is 144

options.name: scope_count
options.description:
how many Scopes are in the game

Vanilla is 4

maximum total for all items is 144

options.name: red_id_card_count
options.description:
how many Red ID Cards are in the game

Vanilla is 1

maximum total for all items is 144

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
